---
title: "extra_ppc"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-20"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

#load packages
```{r}
pacman::p_load(
  tidyverse, # Data manipulation and plotting
  dplyr,
  here,         # Robust file paths
  cmdstanr,     # Stan interface
  posterior,    # Posterior analysis
  bayesplot,    # Plotting MCMC
  furrr,        # Parallel processing
  future        # Future backend
)
```

#create the data (vars, basic model logic)
#repeated from stan_assignment2 (Param recovery will actually use all the alternative values)
```{r}
trials <- 120 # Number of trials per simulated agent

# Define the agent function (copied from previous chapter)
WSLSAgent_noise_f <- function(prevChoice, feedback, noise, win_stay, lose_shift){
   if (feedback == 1) {
    # Win: stay with prob win_stay, otherwise shift
    choice <- ifelse(runif(1) < win_stay, prevChoice, 1 - prevChoice)
  } else {
    # Loss: shift with prob lose_shift, otherwise stay
    choice <- ifelse(runif(1) < lose_shift, 1 - prevChoice, prevChoice)
  }
  
  if (noise > 0 && rbinom(1, 1, noise) == 1) { #if noise, override with 50/50
    choice <- rbinom(1, 1, 0.5)
  }
  return(choice)
}

RandomAgent_f <- function(rate){
  choice <- rbinom(1, 1, rate)
  return(choice)
}
```

#create the data 2 (WSLS function for simulation)
#repeated from stan_assignment2
```{r}
#simulate the wsls agent separately (to have the feedback and such)
Simulate_WSLS_agent_noise_f <- function(noise, opponent, trials = 120, win_stay, lose_shift) {
  choices  <- integer(trials)
  feedback <- integer(trials)
  
  #first is random
  choices[1] <- rbinom(1, 1, 0.5)

  for (t in 2:trials) {
    feedback[t - 1] <- as.integer(opponent[t - 1] == choices[t - 1])
    choices[t] <- WSLSAgent_noise_f(choices[t - 1], feedback[t - 1], noise, win_stay, lose_shift)
  }
  # Fill in the last trial's feedback
  feedback[trials] <- as.integer(opponent[trials] == choices[trials])
  
  return(list(choices = choices, feedback = feedback))
}
```

#param recovery!!!
```{r}
# 1. Define the parameter grid
recovery_grid <- tidyr::expand_grid(
  n_trials   = c(30, 60, 120, 240), #our data only goes up to 120
  true_ws    = c(0.3, 0.5, 0.7, 0.9),  # win_stay values (4 different possible hardcoded values)
  true_ls    = c(0.3, 0.5, 0.7, 0.9)   # lose_shift values (4 different possible hardcoded values)
  #noise is not part of our model afaik
)

#T/F to force run the recovery
regenerate_simulations <- TRUE

#define path for recovery file
stan_results_dir <- "simmodels"
recovery_file <- (here(stan_results_dir,"WSLS_recovery_draws.rds"))

#define path for model file & saved fitted model
stan_file_bernoulli <- here("stan_model_actual_WSLS.stan")
model_file_bernoulli <- here(stan_results_dir, "stan_model_actual_WSLS.stan")

# 2. Define the isolated recovery pipeline
if (regenerate_simulations || !file.exists(recovery_file)) {

  run_recovery <- function(n_trials, true_ws, true_ls) {
    
    # Generate synthetic empirical data
    opponent <- purrr::map_int(1:n_trials, ~RandomAgent_f(rate = 0.5))
    result   <- Simulate_WSLS_agent_noise_f(noise = 0, opponent = opponent, trials = n_trials, lose_shift = true_ls, win_stay = true_ws)

  mod_bernoulli <- cmdstan_model(stan_file_bernoulli,
                                 cpp_options = list(stan_threads = FALSE),
                                 stanc_options = list("O1"))
    
    # Structure the data block for Stan
    rec_data_list <- list(
      n        = n_trials,
      h        = result$choices,
      feedback = result$feedback
    )
    
    # Fit the generative model
    fit <- mod_bernoulli$sample(
      data            = rec_data_list,
      chains          = 1,
      iter_warmup     = 1000,
      iter_sampling   = 2000,
      refresh         = 0,
      show_messages   = FALSE
    )
    
    # Extract structural draws immediately to avoid temporary file fragility
    draws_df <- fit$draws(c("win_stay", "lose_shift"), format = "df")
    
    tibble::tibble(
      trials   = n_trials,
      true_ws  = true_ws,
      true_ls  = true_ls,
      win_stay  = draws_df$win_stay,
      lose_shift = draws_df$lose_shift
    )
  }
  
  # 3. Establish the parallel backend and execute mapping
  future::plan(future::multisession, workers = 2)
  
  recovery_draws <- furrr::future_pmap(
    recovery_grid,
    run_recovery,
    .options = furrr::furrr_options(seed = TRUE, stdout = FALSE)
  ) |>
    dplyr::bind_rows()
  
  future::plan(future::sequential)
  saveRDS(recovery_draws, recovery_file)

} else {
  recovery_draws <- readRDS(recovery_file)
}

```

```{r}
# 4. Compress draws into rigorous posterior summaries
recovery_summary <- recovery_draws |>
  dplyr::group_by(trials, true_ws, true_ls) |>
  dplyr::summarize(
    ws_mean     = mean(win_stay),
    ws_lower_95 = quantile(win_stay, 0.025),
    ws_upper_95 = quantile(win_stay, 0.975),
    ls_mean     = mean(lose_shift),
    ls_lower_95 = quantile(lose_shift, 0.025),
    ls_upper_95 = quantile(lose_shift, 0.975),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    ws_label = paste0("True win-stay: ", true_ws),
    ls_label = paste0("True lose-shift: ", true_ls)
  )

# 5. Visualize the geometric shrinkage across the parameter space
#winstay
p_ws <- ggplot(recovery_summary, aes(x = factor(trials), y = ws_mean)) +
  geom_hline(aes(yintercept = true_ws), color = "black", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_pointrange(
    aes(ymin = ws_lower_95, ymax = ws_upper_95, color = factor(true_ws)),
    linewidth = 1, size = 0.8
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ ws_label) +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "mako", begin = 0.2, end = 0.8) +
  ggtitle("Param Recovery: Win-Stay") +
  xlab("Number of Trials (N)") +
  ylab("Posterior Estimate of Win-Stay (Mean & 95% CrI)") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0.1, 1.0)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray95", color = NA),
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray90", linetype = "dotted")
  )

#loseshift
p_ls <- ggplot(recovery_summary, aes(x = factor(trials), y = ls_mean)) +
  geom_hline(aes(yintercept = true_ls), color = "black", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_pointrange(
    aes(ymin = ls_lower_95, ymax = ls_upper_95, color = factor(true_ls)),
    linewidth = 1, size = 0.8
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ ls_label) +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "rocket", begin = 0.2, end = 0.8) +
  ggtitle("Param Recovery: Lose-Shift") +
  xlab("Number of Trials (N)") +
  ylab("Posterior Estimate of Lose-switch (Mean & 95% CrI)") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0.1, 1.0)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray95", color = NA),
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray90", linetype = "dotted")
  )

gridExtra::grid.arrange(p_ws, p_ls, ncol = 2, nrow = 1, widths = c(1, 1))
```

```{r}
# Win-Stay identity plot
p_ws_alt <- ggplot(recovery_summary, aes(x = true_ws, y = ws_mean)) +
  geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, color = "black", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = ws_lower_95, ymax = ws_upper_95, color = factor(true_ws)),
                  linewidth = 1, size = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~ trials, labeller = as_labeller(function(x) paste0(x, " Trials"))) +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "mako", begin = 0.2, end = 0.8) +
  coord_fixed(xlim = c(0.1, 1.0), ylim = c(0.1, 1.0)) +
  ggtitle("Param Recovery: Win-Stay") +
  xlab("Generative Ground Truth") +
  ylab("Posterior Estimate: Mean & 95% CrI") +
  theme(
    legend.position    = "none",
    strip.background   = element_rect(fill = "gray95", color = NA),
    strip.text         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
    panel.grid.major   = element_line(color = "gray90", linetype = "dotted")
  )

# Lose-Shift identity plot
p_ls_alt <- ggplot(recovery_summary, aes(x = true_ls, y = ls_mean)) +
  geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, color = "black", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = ls_lower_95, ymax = ls_upper_95, color = factor(true_ls)),
                  linewidth = 1, size = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~ trials, labeller = as_labeller(function(x) paste0(x, " Trials"))) +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "rocket", begin = 0.2, end = 0.8) +
  coord_fixed(xlim = c(0.1, 1.0), ylim = c(0.1, 1.0)) +
  ggtitle("Param Recovery: Lose-Shift") +
  xlab("Generative Ground Truth") +
  ylab("Posterior Estimate: Mean & 95% CrI)") +
  theme(
    legend.position    = "none",
    strip.background   = element_rect(fill = "gray95", color = NA),
    strip.text         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
    panel.grid.major   = element_line(color = "gray90", linetype = "dotted")
  )

#combined
gridExtra::grid.arrange(p_ws_alt, p_ls_alt, ncol = 2, nrow = 1, widths = c(1, 1))
```
